com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: This field is fulfilled if the account manager has BIP license
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Account Manager
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Account_Manager__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Select if this is a Residential or a Professional Account or Distributor GEO, LEO, Video
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Account Type
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Account_Type__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.label: Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands
Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands
LV. 1 - Cannot Create New Account (1st subscription, new subscription)
com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.value: LV. 1 - Cannot Create New Account (1st subscription, new subscription)

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.label: LV. 3 - Cannot Operate Admin Actions (Options, Add-on)
com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.value: LV. 3 - Cannot Operate Admin Actions (Options, Add-on)

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Number of Month Paid in Advance
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Number_of_Month_Paid_in_Advance__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.calculatedFormula:
IF ( TEXT(Country_Name__c)=='', 'NA', IF (CONTAINS("ARE:DZA:AGO:BWA:IOT:BDI:CMR:CPV:CAF:TCD:COM:MYT:COG:COD:BEN:GNQ:ETH:ERI:ATF:DJI:GAB:GMB:GHA:GIN:CIV:KEN:LSO:LBR:LBY:MDG:MWI:MLI:MRT:MUS:MAR:MOZ:NAM:NER:NGA:GNB:REU:RWA:SHN:STP:SEN:SYC:SLE:SOM:ZAF:ZWE:SSD:SDN:ESH:SWZ:TGO:TUN:UGA:EGY:TZA:BFA:ZMB", TEXT(Country_Name__c)), 'Africa', IF (CONTAINS("ALB:AND:AZE:AUT:ARM:BEL:BIH:BGR:BLR:HRV:CYP:CZE:DNK:EST:FRO:FIN:ALA:FRA:GEO:DEU:GIB:GRC:VAT:HUN:ISL:IRL:ITA:KAZ:XKX:LVA:LIE:LTU:LUX:MLT:MCO:MDA:MNE:NLD:NOR:POL:PRT:ROU:RUS:SMR:SRB:SVK:SVN:ESP:SJM:SWE:CHE:TUR:UKR:MKD:GBR:GGY:JEY:IMN", TEXT(Country_Name__c)), 'Europe', IF (CONTAINS("GUF:PRI:CRI:CUB:DMA:SLV:JAM:GRD:GTM:HTI:HND:MEX:NIC:PAN:LCA:VCT:KNA:USA:ARG:BOL:BRA:CHL:COL:ECU:GUY:DOM:PRY:PER:SUR:TTO:URY:VEN:MAF:BLM:BMU:CYM:AIA:JEY:ABW:SXM:GRL:FLK:IMN:MSR:SPM:TCA:VGB:ATG:BHS:BRB:BLZ:CAN:CUW:GLP:XAK:XHA:VIR:MTQ", TEXT(Country_Name__c)), 'America', IF (CONTAINS("TJK:TWN:TKM:KGZ:AFG:MMR:BRN:KHM:LKA:CHN:CYP:PRK:KOR:PHL:XPX:JPN:JOR:IND:IDN:IRN:IRQ:ISR:KWT:LAO:LBN:TLS:MDV:MYS:MNG:NPL:OMN:SAU:BHR:BGD:BTN:PAK:QAT:SGP:SYR:THA:TUR:VNM:YEM:KAZ:UZB:ARM:PSE:MYT:HKG", TEXT(Country_Name__c)), 'Asia', IF (CONTAINS("AUS:FJI:KIR:MHL:FSM:NRU:NZL:PLW:PNG:SLB:WSM:TON:TUV:VUT:NCL:COK:PYF:PCN:WLF:MNP:ASM:GUM", TEXT(Country_Name__c)), 'Oceania', IF (CONTAINS("ATA:ATF:BVT", TEXT(Country_Name__c)), 'Antarctica', 'Other')
))))))
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Region
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Region__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Insert the Surname of the Account
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Surname
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Surname__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: This field indicates if the customer account has authorized Pay By Link as a payment method.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Is Pay By Link Authorized
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: IsPayByLinkAuthorized__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: A checkbox to show if the default payment method for the account is Pay by Link.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Is Pay by Link Default Payment Method
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: IsPaybyLinkDefaultPaymentMethod__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Period which will be used to evaluate after how many days the partner must be taken into inactive status
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Idle Grace Period
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Idle_Grace_Period__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.label: Non-Standard Land Mobility Terminal Class KU-band
NEWTEC E113A INDIAN AND PACIFIC OCEAN

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Error message received from Hosted Page of Zuora or from Adyen during the Payment creation
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Payment Error Message
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Payment_Error_Message__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Sum of all accounts ballances tied to a Salesforce Account
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Zuora Account Balance
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora_Account_Balance__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Check this field to enable the Terminal Authorization Process
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Enable Terminal Authorization Process
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: SKL_EnableTerminalAuthorizationProcess__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Tax Identification Number (only for Tanzanian customers)
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: TIN
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: SKL_TIN__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Vat Registration Number (for Tanzanian customers)
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: VRN
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: SKL_VRN__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.calculatedFormula: IF( INCLUDES( promotionsAdded__c , "MPR2022") , "MPR2022;", null)& IF( INCLUDES( promotionsAdded__c , "DVM2022") , "DVM2022;", null)& IF( INCLUDES( promotionsAdded__c , "AF100PER") , "AF100PER;", null)& IF( INCLUDES( promotionsAdded__c , "LPEUR3M") , "LPEUR3M;", null)& IF( INCLUDES( promotionsAdded__c , "MM30PER1M") , "MM30PER1M;", null)& IF( INCLUDES( promotionsAdded__c , "MF25PER1M") , "MF25PER1M;", null)& IF( INCLUDES( promotionsAdded__c , "E5MP2022") , "E5MP2022;", null)& IF( INCLUDES( promotionsAdded__c , "WSSV2022") , "WSSV2022;", null)& IF( INCLUDES( promotionsAdded__c , "FHT") , "FHT;", null)
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: promotionsAddedText
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: promotionsAddedText__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Indicates a record used for Marketing Cloud testing.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Test SFMC
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Test_SFMC__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: OneWeb's End Customer Account ID
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: ONW external ID
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: ONW_external_ID__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.calculatedFormula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Industry,""), 0,20) + IF( ISPICKVAL(Rating,""), 0,20) + IF( LEN(BillingCity) = 0, 0,20) + IF(LEN(Phone) = 0, 0,20) + IF( ISPICKVAL(Type,""), 0,20)
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Data Quality Score
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Data_Quality_Score__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.calculatedFormula: IF( Data_Quality_Score__c =100,"All Account Details Captured", "Missing: "&IF( ISPICKVAL( Industry,""),"Industry, ","")&""&IF(ISPICKVAL(Rating,""), "Rating, ","")&""&IF( LEN(BillingCity) = 0, "Complete Address, ","")&""&IF( LEN(Phone) = 0, "Phone, ","")&""&IF( ISPICKVAL(Type,""), "Type",""))
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Data Quality Description
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Data_Quality_Description__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Validity period to guarantee specialized Eutelsat users access to their account. His value is set to 99 years as default.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Login Access Duration
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Login_Access_Duration__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Date that indicates when the partner set the grant login
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Login Access Start Date
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Login_Access_start_date__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.calculatedFormula: Case (Login_Access_Duration__c, 'Never', Login_Access_start_date__c-1, '1 day', Login_Access_start_date__c, '1 week', Login_Access_start_date__c+7, '1 month', ADDMONTHS(Login_Access_start_date__c,1), '1 year', ADDMONTHS(Login_Access_start_date__c,12), 'Always', ADDMONTHS(Login_Access_start_date__c,1188), Login_Access_start_date__c )
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Calculation of login deadline
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Login Access Deadline
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Login_Access_Deadline__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.calculatedFormula: IF((ISPICKVAL( Login_Access_Duration__c, 'Always')) ,true, IF( Login_Access_Deadline__c>= today(), true, false))
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Login grant calculation: check the login deadline or the illimitate period. For Demo account is always TRUE
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Login Access Granted
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Login_Access_Granted__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: This flag indicates a commercial freeze action activated by Business Ops
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Freeze users
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Freeze_users__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.label: SR NEWTEC E70B MIDDLE EAST WIDEBEAM
com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.value: SR NEWTEC E70B MIDDLE EAST WIDEBEAM

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.label: SR NEWTEC E172B SOUTH WEST PACIFIC
com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.value: SR NEWTEC E172B SOUTH WEST PACIFIC

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.value: SR NEWTEC E172B SOUTH EAST PACIFIC

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.value: SR NEWTEC E172B NORTH EAST ASIA

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.value: SR NEWTEC E172B OCEANIA SOUTH PACIFIC

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.value: SR NEWTEC E110A SOUTH INDIAN OCEAN

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.value: SR NEWTEC E113A INDIAN AND PACIFIC OCEAN

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.label: SR NEWTEC E3B GLOBAL C BAND 08C
com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.value: SR NEWTEC E3B GLOBAL C BAND 08C

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.label: SR NEWTEC E113WA NORTH AMERICA K07
com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.value: SR NEWTEC E113WA NORTH AMERICA K07

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.label: SR NEWTEC E3B GLOBAL C BAND 13C
com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.value: SR NEWTEC E3B GLOBAL C BAND 13C

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.label: SR NEWTEC E113WA NORTH AMERICA C BAND C10
com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.value: SR NEWTEC E113WA NORTH AMERICA C BAND C10

com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.label: SR NEWTEC E113WA PANAMERICA HEMI K22
com.sforce.soap.partner.PicklistEntry.value: SR NEWTEC E113WA PANAMERICA HEMI K22

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Date when the account passed in IDLE status
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Idle start date
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Idle_start_date__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Days counter after the account has gone in IDLE status
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Idle alert counter
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Idle_alert_counter__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: This field is a note fulfilled by Business operation team when the manager is not traced in BIP otherwise his name is visible in the lookup field ACCOUNT MANAGER
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: GCRM Account Manager
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: GCRM_Area_Manager__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.ScopeInfo.label: My team's account team and their accounts
com.sforce.soap.partner.ScopeInfo.name: accountteam_team

com.sforce.soap.partner.ScopeInfo.label: My account team and my accounts
com.sforce.soap.partner.ScopeInfo.name: own_accountteam
